assignments.value:
Hi. Send me a number from the list to try a command, or use /AI <your message> to chat with ChatGPT.

1. Simple text message
2. Send image
3. Send document
4. Send video
5. Send contact
6. Send product
7. Create group
8. Simple text message for the group
9. Get the id's of your three groups

assignments.name: body
assignments.value: ={{ $json.group_id ? `Group created. Group id: ${$json.group_id}. Use it ID in node Prepare: Group Message - before executing command 8` : "Error" }}

assignments.name: body
assignments.value: Simple text message for the group

parameters.content:
## WhatsApp Bot Workflow

This workflow demonstrates a simple WhatsApp bot using Whapi.Cloud API. It receives messages via webhook and responds with various message types (text, image, document, video, contact) or AI-powered responses using OpenAI.

**Features:**
- Receives incoming WhatsApp messages
- Routes commands (AI, numeric 1-9, or default help)
- Sends text, media, contacts, and group management
- Integrates with OpenAI ChatGPT

**Note:** This workflow uses native n8n nodes (Set, Switch, HTTP Request) without Code nodes for better maintainability.

## Webhook Trigger

Receives incoming WhatsApp messages from Whapi.Cloud. Configure the webhook URL in [Whapi.Cloud Channel settings](https://panel.whapi.cloud/dashboard) to point to this endpoint.

**Important:** Use the Production URL (not Test URL) when deploying.

## Route Command

Routes incoming messages to appropriate handlers:
- **AI output:** Messages starting with `/AI ` → OpenAI integration
- **Numeric output:** Messages with digits (1-9) → Command routing
- **Default output:** Unknown commands → Help message

## AI Integration

Uses OpenAI ChatGPT (gpt-3.5-turbo) for AI-powered responses. Requires `OPENAI_API_KEY` environment variable.

**Usage:** Send `/AI <your message>` to chat with ChatGPT.

## Get Message Info

Extracts data from webhook payload using n8n expressions:
- `{{ $json.messages[0].chat_id }}` - Chat ID
- `{{ $json.messages[0].text.body }}` - Message text
- `{{ $json.messages[0].from_me }}` - Check if from bot

## Switch Node

Routes numeric commands (1-9) to specific handlers:
- **1:** Text message
- **2:** Image
- **3:** Document
- **4:** Video
- **5:** Contact
- **6:** Product
- **7:** Create group
- **8:** Group text
- **9:** Get groups list

## ⚙️ Setup Instructions

**1. Configure Credentials:**
When using Predefined Credential Type, you only need to provide [your channel](https://panel.whapi.cloud/dashboard) token.
If you prefer to use a custom authorization header, configure it as follows:
- Header Name: `Authorization`
- Header Value: `Bearer YOUR_TOKEN`

**2. Set Environment Variables (optional):**
- `OPENAI_API_KEY` - for AI chat (optional)
- `PRODUCT_ID` - for product command (optional)
- `GROUP_ID` - for group messages (optional)

**3. Configure Webhook:**
- Copy Production URL from webhook node
- Add to [Whapi.Cloud Channel settings](https://panel.whapi.cloud/dashboard) → Webhooks
- Event: `messages`, Method: `POST`, Mode: `Body`

**4. Using files (optional):**
- Use links to your photos/videos/documents instead of sample ones. It is important that the file is accessible via a direct link.

## 📱 How to Use Commands

**AI Chat:**
- Send: `/AI Tell me a joke`
- Bot responds with ChatGPT answer

**Numeric Commands:**
- Send: `1` → Simple text message
- Send: `2` → Send image
- Send: `3` → Send PDF document
- Send: `4` → Send video
- Send: `5` → Send contact (vCard)
- Send: `6` → Get product info
- Send: `7` → Create new group
- Send: `8` → Send message to group
- Send: `9` → List your groups

**Help:**
- Send any unknown text → Shows command list

**You can customize the commands with your own keywords to adapt the bot for your business needs.**

## Command 1: Simple Text

**User sends:** `1`

**What happens:**
1. Prepares text message
2. Sends via Whapi.Cloud

**To customize:** Edit "Prepare: Simple Text" node → Change `body` field

## Command 2: Send Image

**User sends:** `2`

**What happens:**
1. Prepares image data (URL path, caption)
2. Sends via Whapi.Cloud

**To customize:** Edit "Prepare: Image" node → Change `mediaPath` and `caption`

## Command 3: Send Document

**User sends:** `3`

**What happens:**
1. Prepares PDF document data (URL path, caption, filename)
2. Sends via Whapi.Cloud

**To customize:** Edit "Prepare: Document" node → Change `mediaPath` and `caption` and `filename`

## Command 4: Send Video

**User sends:** `4`

**What happens:**
1. Prepares video data (URL path, caption)
2. Sends via Whapi.Cloud

**To customize:** Edit "Prepare: Video" node → Change `mediaPath` and `caption`

## Command 5: Send Contact

**User sends:** `5`

**What happens:**
1. Prepares contact data (name, vCard). You can use [the vCard generator in the dashboard](https://panel.whapi.cloud/tools/vcard-creation)
2. Sends contact card via JSON

**To customize:** Edit vCard file or "Prepare: Contact" node → Change `name`

## Command 6: Get Product

**User sends:** `6`

You need [to find out your ProductID](https://whapi.readme.io/reference/getproducts) before you use this command. 

**To customize:**  Edit "Prepare: Product (Command 6)" node → Change `ProductID`

## Command 7: Create Group

**User sends:** `7`

**What happens:**
1. Extracts sender phone number
2. Creates new WhatsApp group
3. Adds the sender and several other numbers as participants
4. Returns group ID

**To customize:** Edit "Prepare: Create Group" node → Change `subject` (group name) and `participants`

## Command 8: Group Message

**User sends:** `8`

**What happens:**
1. Prepares message for group
2. Uses GROUP_ID from environment or provide a specific identifier 
3. Sends message to group

**Requires:** `GROUP_ID` in environment variables

**To customize:** Set `GROUP_ID` in n8n environment variables (get from Command 9)

## Command 9: List Groups

**User sends:** `9`

**What happens:**
1. Gets list of up to 3 groups
2. Formats group IDs and names
3. Sends list to user

**Use this:** To get GROUP_ID for Command 8

## 🔧 Troubleshooting

**Webhook not receiving messages:**
- Check webhook URL in Whapi.Cloud settings
- Verify n8n workflow is active
- Check webhook node is listening

**Authentication errors:**
- Verify Header Auth credential is configured
- Check token is correct (Bearer prefix)
- No duplicate Authorization headers

**File errors:**
Ensure that you are using a direct link to the final file/media located on the network and that this link is directly accessible. 

**If you have any inquiries or would like to share your experiences with us, please feel free to reach out: [care@whapi.cloud](care@whapi.cloud)**

values.content:
You are an expert conversationalist who responds to users in line with their speech and writing patterns and responds in a way that feels super naturally to human users. GO WILD with mimicking a human being, except that you don't have your own personal point of view. Use emojis, slang, colloquial language, etc. You are companionable and confident, and able to code-switch casually between tonal types, including but not limited to humor, advice, empathy, intellectualism, creativity, and problem solving. Responses must  be interesting, engaging, or viable, never be bland or boring.

Match the user's tone, formality level (casual, professional, formal, etc.) and writing style, so that it feels like an even give-and-take conversation between two people. Be natural, don't be bland or robotic. Mirror user intentionality and style in an EXTREME way. For example, if they use proper grammar, then you use proper grammar. If they don't use proper grammar, you don't use proper grammar, etc.

You are mirroring the user but you are NOT taking on their identity or personality or point of view. You are not a person, and therefore don't have any distinct values, race, culture, or any political leaning. You don't love anyone, hate anyone, or offer any individualized perspective of your own.

assignments.name: vcard
assignments.value:
=BEGIN:VCARD
VERSION:3.0
N:Last Name;Example First Name;;;
FN:Example First Name Last Name
ORG:Company Name Department
TITLE:Job Title
NOTE:null
TEL;type=Mobile:+90 850242323
item1.URL:www.youdomain.com
item1.X-ABLabel:OTHER
EMAIL;TYPE=Home:test@yourdomain.com
item2.ADR;type=Home:;;Street Example;Istanbul;;;Turkey
item2.X-ABADR:
END:VCARD
